positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a magnificent celestial fox (kitsune) in a dynamic pose, surrounded by glowing bioluminescent cherry blossoms and nebula dust. The fox should have elegant, sweeping tails and an ethereal glow, rendered in a clean, high-contrast silhouette style with Japanese folklore aesthetics and Art Deco influences. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and soft gold accents for a rich, jewel-toned palette. The composition must be centered, making the fox the clear focal point, suitable for a graphic t-shirt print. Highly detailed, vector illustration quality, volumetric lighting, clean lines, studio background.
negative: blurry, artifact, deformed, text, logo, watermark, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, photorealism, monochrome, messy, dirty
